subcodes.first_line: Your going and coming was like unto lightning; it was not clearly perceived - ere thou wert seated thou hadst departed, unheard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرمودند ذهاب و ایاب شما بمثابه برق بود درست معلوم نشد ننشسته رفتید و نشنیده
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
